heading: Murrays Beach vs Murrays Run — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrays Beach, New South Wales and Murrays Run, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murrays Run has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Murrays Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrays Beach or Murrays Run safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrays Beach has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Murrays Run scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrays Beach scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Murrays Run scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrays Beach or Murrays Run?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murrays Run has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
